titel:
New regulations apply to researchers, doctoral students, students, and individuals with temporary protection status.

Here's a breakdown of the changes:

*   **Researchers:** [Details about new rules for researchers]
*   **Doctoral Students:** [Details about new rules for doctoral students]
*   **Students:** [Details about new rules for students]
*   **Individuals with Temporary Protection Status:** [Details about new rules for individuals with temporary protection status]

For more information, please visit: [URL]
html:
June 11, 2026

On June 11th, new regulations will come into effect that affect individuals who are granted residence permits as researchers, doctoral students, students, or those with temporary protection under the mass displacement directive.

For students, the new regulations include:

Read more about the new regulations for residence permits for studies at higher education institutions.

For doctoral students and researchers, the new regulations include:

Read more about the new regulations if you are a researcher or doctoral student.

The new regulations also affect individuals with temporary protection under the mass displacement directive. They may be eligible to apply for the following types of permits without first having to leave Sweden:

Read more about the new regulations for applying for another type of permit while in Sweden.
tldr: Starting June 11th, new regulations will be implemented for individuals residing in Sweden due to studies, research, or temporary protection.
lattlast:
The new regulations come into effect on June 11th and apply to individuals who have residence permits for studying at a university, or for working as doctoral students and researchers. This means changes in how these individuals can live and work in Sweden.

The rules also affect people who have been granted temporary protection under the mass migration directive, which is special protection for people fleeing war or difficult situations. For these individuals, it will be easier to apply for other types of residence permits without having to leave Sweden first.

The purpose of these changes is to clarify the regulations for different groups who are in Sweden on a temporary basis. If you belong to one of these groups, your rights or the way you apply for a permit may change starting from this date.
